title: Unique Spawn Eggs Add-on
description: A update for Gouchnox's (outdated) Unique Spawn Eggs
body: This pack is an add-on! This pack does NOT work without the base texturepack by [Gouchnox](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/gouchnox). Their texture pack can be found [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/1-13-1-16-unique-spawn-eggs) This pack requires the base texture pack. _(An independent pack is currently in progress!)_
